g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_ITM_Mod__1414
g.text: SourceString = Cannot activate/deactivate mods during play.

g.title: GetStatusToolTip__43
g.text: SourceString = Audio/Visual/Cosmetic mods have unknown status, until installed and enabled.-----------Can become either Verified or Sandbox.

g.title: CheckGameVersionBeforeEnable__222
g.text: SourceString = This mod has not been updated to the current version of the game.Are you sure you want to enable it?

g.title: GetDependencyCheckboxTooltip__5
g.text: SourceString = Cannot enable, because a dependency is disabled or removed.

g.title: GetDownloadVersionToolTip__27
g.text: SourceString = Download is required.-----------Required mods are required to be downloaded to the client on joining a modded server.

g.title: GetDownloadVersionToolTip__206
g.text: SourceString = Download is required.-----------Required mods are required to be downloaded to the client on joining a modded server.

g.title: GetDownloadVersionToolTip__385
g.text: SourceString = Download is optional.-----------Optional mods are not required to be downloaded to the client on joining a modded server. Clients have the option to download them anyway.
